title: [Broken Lands, Hidden Stairs]
description: The stairwell is cramped and musty, with a thick layer of dust which rises into the air from the slightest breeze.  A lone pinpoint of light can be seen at the top of the stairs, while a blanket of darkness shrouds the bottom.

wayto.6632: ;e if celerity = Spell[506] and celerity.known? and celerity.affordable? and not celerity.active?; celerity.cast; end; until dothistimeout('search', 3, /anything of interest|concealed door/) =~ /concealed door/ do end; move 'go door'
